div.style: padding: 8px 0 24px 0;

border-radius: 28px; padding: 34px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #071426 0%, #2d2370 55%, #c23391 100%); color: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.22); overflow: hidden; position: relative;
position: absolute; right: -80px; top: -100px; width: 320px; height: 320px; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.20);
position: absolute; right: 120px; bottom: -140px; width: 260px; height: 260px; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.18);
position: relative; z-index: 1; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 28px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap;
max-width: 720px;

display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 7px 14px; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); color: #9eeaff; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.16em; font-size: 12px; text-transform: uppercase;

div.p: Manage appointments, services, resources, and customer follow-ups from one clean workspace.

div.style: display: flex; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap;

button.name: action_open_admin_portal
button.style: border: 0; border-radius: 16px; padding: 15px 22px; font-weight: 800; color: #ffffff; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7c3aed, #ec4899); box-shadow: 0 16px 36px rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.28);

button.name: action_open_public_booking
button.style: border: 0; border-radius: 16px; padding: 15px 22px; font-weight: 800; color: #101828; background: #ffffff;

div.style: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(210px, 1fr)); gap: 18px; margin-top: 22px;

button.name: action_open_appointments
button.style: min-height: 118px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 22px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 14px 40px rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.08); text-align: left; padding: 20px;

div.style: font-size: 12px; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.14em; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 10px;

button.name: action_open_appointments
button.style: min-height: 118px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 22px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 14px 40px rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.08); text-align: left; padding: 20px;

div.style: font-size: 12px; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.14em; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 10px;

button.name: action_open_appointments
button.style: min-height: 118px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 22px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 14px 40px rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.08); text-align: left; padding: 20px;

div.style: font-size: 12px; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.14em; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 10px;

button.name: action_open_appointments
button.style: min-height: 118px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 22px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 14px 40px rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.08); text-align: left; padding: 20px;

div.style: font-size: 12px; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.14em; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 10px;
display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; margin-top: 22px;
border-radius: 24px; padding: 24px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; box-shadow: 0 14px 40px rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.08);

width: 54px; height: 54px; border-radius: 18px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #06b6d4, #7c3aed); color: #ffffff; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 900; margin-bottom: 18px;

div.p: Open the premium admin portal to review bookings, services, availability, leads, SMTP, and settings.

button.name: action_open_admin_portal
button.style: border: 0; border-radius: 14px; padding: 12px 18px; font-weight: 800; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7c3aed, #ec4899);

div.style: border-radius: 24px; padding: 24px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; box-shadow: 0 14px 40px rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.08);

width: 54px; height: 54px; border-radius: 18px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7c3aed, #ec4899); color: #ffffff; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 900; margin-bottom: 18px;

div.p: Services, categories, resources, and cancelled appointment counters for quick operational review.

div.style: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 12px;
padding: 14px; border-radius: 16px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #edf2f7;
font-size: 12px; color: #64748b; font-weight: 800;
padding: 14px; border-radius: 16px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #edf2f7;
font-size: 12px; color: #64748b; font-weight: 800;
padding: 14px; border-radius: 16px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #edf2f7;
font-size: 12px; color: #64748b; font-weight: 800;
padding: 14px; border-radius: 16px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #edf2f7;
font-size: 12px; color: #64748b; font-weight: 800;
